lesson.title: Read the defender, not the spot.
lesson.body_md:
## What is the Backdoor Window?

When your defender steps into the passing lane to deny you the catch, they are guarding the pass — not the basket. The space behind them just opened up. That space is the **Backdoor Window**.

```takeaway
When your defender sits in the passing lane, the basket is open behind them.
```

## The cue

Look at the defender, not the ball. Three things tell you the window is open:

- A **hand** in the lane between you and the ball.
- A **foot** in the lane on the same side as the hand.
- Their **chest** is between the ball and you, with hips opened toward the sideline.

```tip
If you can see the back of your defender's shoulder, you can see the rim. Go.
```

## How to punish it

1. **Sell the catch.** Step toward the ball with target hands so the defender commits.
2. **Plant the outside foot.** One hard plant tells your body and your teammates the cut is on.
3. **Cut behind, not in front.** In front lets the defender ride your route. Behind takes them out of the play entirely.
4. **Show target hands at the rim.** Give the passer a window to throw to, not just a body to chase.

```mistake
Cutting in front of the defender. They ride your shoulder all the way to the rim.
Fix: go behind. The defender can't turn and chase as fast as you can cut.
```

## Self-check after the rep

```reveal
Q: Did I see the hand-and-foot denial?
A: Read the defender first. The denial cue is what unlocks the cut — without it, a backdoor is a guess.
```

```reveal
Q: Did I plant and go behind, not in front?
A: Behind the defender wins. In front lets them stay attached.
```

```reveal
Q: Did I cut hard enough to make it a scoring cut?
A: A drift is not a cut. The plant has to be loud enough that the passer sees it.
```

```reveal
Q: Did I show target hands at the rim?
A: Give the passer a window. Hands up, palms ready, eyes on the ball.
```

## Try it

```quiz
Q: Your defender's hand and foot are in the passing lane. Best move?
- Wait for the ball ✗
- Cut in front of them toward the ball ✗
- Plant and cut behind them to the rim ✓
Why: The defender already gave up the basket. Punish the denial.
```

```coach
If they deny the pass, cut behind them.
```
